title: Arai Corso X Operator Blue

specs.material: Thermo-Molded Polycarbonate Shell with Multi-Density EPS Liner

technical_analysis: The Arai Corso X Operator Blue utilizes a proprietary thermo-molded polycarbonate shell construction that offers superior impact absorption compared to traditional fiberglass composites. This material choice significantly reduces overall helmet weight while maintaining the rigorous safety standards required for both DOT and ECE 22.06 certifications, ensuring optimal protection without compromising on rider comfort during extended rides.
marketing_description: Designed for the modern urban commuter who demands uncompromising safety and style, the Corso X Operator Blue redefines the full-face helmet category with its sleek, aerodynamic silhouette. The distinctive blue finish is complemented by high-visibility accents, making it a standout choice for city riding where visibility and aesthetics are paramount.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Arai Corso X Operator Blue: a lightweight, DOT & ECE certified full-face helmet featuring advanced thermo-molded technology and superior ventilation for urban riders.
